name: Word Learning
description: Expand your vocabulary with picture definitions.

name: Letter Arrangement
description: Drag scrambled letters into the correct order.

name: Missing Letter
description: Fill in the blank to spell the word correctly.

name: Picture Identification
description: Look at the picture and tap the matching word.

name: Listening Activity
description: Listen to the word and tap the correct spelling.

name: Flash Cards
description: Tap cards to flip and review words.

name: Matching Game
description: Match pictures, letters, and words together.

name: Memory Game
description: Flip cards and find pairs of identical images/words.

name: Quiz Mode
description: Earn points and stars in a random test.
